title: Aureline security advisory identity record
description: Boundary schema for advisory_identity_record frozen in docs/security/advisory_identity_and_install_assessment_contract.md. The record is the minimal, copy-safe identity and reference envelope every advisory-related surface can cite (advisory center, emergency banners, Help/About, release notes, support/admin exports, mirrors, offline bundles) so disclosure and response state resolve from one stable advisory ID family without alias drift. The record carries the Aureline advisory id plus nullable CVE/GHSA alias slots, severity and subject-kind vocabularies, publication/visibility state, copy-safe IDs, durable history linkage, and linkage refs to related emergency-action, revocation, and disable-bundle objects. Raw exploit payloads, raw reporter identities, raw signing material, raw hostnames, raw paths, private registry URLs, and raw evidence bodies never cross this boundary; the record carries opaque refs, typed vocabularies, and reviewable summaries only. Adding a new enum value is additive-minor and bumps advisory_identity_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a governance decision.

advisory_identity_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this advisory identity export.

record_kind.description: Discriminator. Every record carries record_kind = advisory_identity_record.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable id safe to log, export, and deep-link.

monotonic_timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp captured from a monotonic or bounded-skew source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe for UI, CLI, export, and support surfaces.

cve_id_string.description: CVE identifier in the form CVE-YYYY-NNNN+.

ghsa_id_string.description: GHSA identifier in the form GHSA-xxxx-yyyy-zzzz.

aureline_advisory_id_string.description: Stable Aureline advisory id in the form AURELINE-ADV-YYYY-NNNN+. Stable for the life of the advisory.

cve_id.description: CVE alias. Null when no CVE has been assigned.

ghsa_id.description: GHSA alias. Null when no GHSA has been minted.

additional_alias_refs.description: Reserved opaque alias refs for future disclosure schemes.

advisory_identity.description: Advisory identity envelope. aureline_advisory_id is the stable join key; CVE and GHSA are nullable aliases.

publication_state_class.description: Publication state for the identity record itself.

copy_state_class.description: Whether a user/reviewer can copy this id from the current surface/export.

id_value.description: The exact id value copied when copy_state permits it. Sentinel tokens describe unavailable ids.

copy_safe_id_record.description: Copy-safe advisory id row suitable for UI, CLI, release packets, and exports.

lifecycle_state_class.description: Lifecycle state vocabulary used for durable history and prominence rules.

supersedes_advisory_ids.description: Prior advisory ids this record supersedes (when applicable).

superseded_by_advisory_id.description: Next advisory id that superseded this one (when applicable).

history_linkage.description: Durable history linkage so resolved, superseded, and withdrawn advisories remain inspectable.

title.description: Short, copy-safe title for release notes, Help/About, and exports.

copy_safe_ids.description: Copy-safe ids users/operators can copy without opening a browser.

emergency_action_refs.description: Opaque refs to related emergency_action_record ids.

revocation_refs.description: Opaque refs to related revocation record ids.

disable_bundle_refs.description: Opaque refs to related disable-bundle ids (when applicable).

advisory_identity_record.description: Advisory identity record. Minimal copy-safe identity and linkage used across all advisory-related surfaces.
